title: SlopenClaw, an AI agent that procrastinates for you
abstract: Hey, aren't you often staring blankly at your computer screen, procrastinating on tasks that pile up? Enter SlopenClaw, an AI agent designed to help you delay those pesky tasks so you can focus on more enjoyable pursuits. And don’t worry—it will gently nudge you back into action when the time is right.
abstract_zh: 嘿，你是不是也经常对着电脑屏幕发呆，明明有大把事情要做却总忍不住刷手机？现在有了SlopenClaw，它会自动帮你拖延那些让你心烦的工作，给你腾出时间去享受生活！不过别担心，等任务堆积到一定程度时，它还会悄悄提醒你——嘿，是时候开始认真工作了！
